im gonna give you a quick summary on realm mechanics, since the game doesnt explain them clearly or tell you upfront that they exist

this is aequor realm (blue realm). when you have an aequor character in your team, you will see the left image above your characters. clicking yellow will let you change tentacles stances. the red circle displays additional tentacles and clicking on it shows your tentacle damage.

if you're in red stance (Raging Waves), a tentacle will attack each time you deal damage. always switch to red stance at the start of your burst turn. having gmurphy on your team changes some of the details of aequor realm mechanics, namely that switching to white stance (tranquil sea) and red stance has a 3 turn cooldown

<@355079998077665282> this is caro realm mechanic. when you use caro characters, this will show up above your characters. yellow is called Crimson Furnace, and clicking on it will immediately heal you for that many points. It regenerates at the end of each turn, how much that is and the max cap is determined by your max HP

red is the baby meter. if it reaches 100%, you get a baby in hand. you can either use this baby card directly to give a character ultimate (exalt) energy and crit rate, or use a caro character's ultimate to trigger their Devour effect. All caro characters have Devour effect, which consumes baby cards in your hand to do what it says
